title: Marketplace Manager - Delhivery - Immediate Joiners Preferred

jsonLd.title: Marketplace Manager - Delhivery - Immediate Joiners Preferred
jsonLd.description:
Delhivery invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Marketplace Manager at our Vadodara location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Delhivery:
Delhivery is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Content Writing
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in MS Excel

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual performance appraisal
• Referral bonus program
• Flexible working hours
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Vadodara, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Delhivery!
